code: import{getPlanEndDate}from"../utils/membership";const STORAGE_KEY="pulsefit-mock-db-v1";function formatDate(date){return date.toISOString().split("T")[0];}function daysFromToday(days){const date=new Date();date.setHours(0,0,0,0);date.setDate(date.getDate()+days);return formatDate(date);}function createDefaultCustomers(){return[{gymId:"GYM001",customerId:1,fullName:"Sarah Khan",phone:"9876543210",age:27,plan:"1 Month",amountPaid:1500,planStart:daysFromToday(-5),planEnd:getPlanEndDate(daysFromToday(-5),"1 Month"),lastAttended:daysFromToday(0),status:"Active"},{gymId:"GYM001",customerId:2,fullName:"Arjun Mehta",phone:"9811122233",age:31,plan:"1 Month",amountPaid:1600,planStart:daysFromToday(-28),planEnd:getPlanEndDate(daysFromToday(-28),"1 Month"),lastAttended:daysFromToday(-1),status:"Active"},{gymId:"GYM001",customerId:3,fullName:"Neha Reddy",phone:"9822233344",age:24,plan:"1 Month",amountPaid:1400,planStart:daysFromToday(-40),planEnd:getPlanEndDate(daysFromToday(-40),"1 Month"),lastAttended:daysFromToday(-10),status:"Active"},{gymId:"GYM001",customerId:4,fullName:"Vikram Singh",phone:"9833344455",age:29,plan:"3 Months",amountPaid:4200,planStart:daysFromToday(-20),planEnd:getPlanEndDate(daysFromToday(-20),"3 Months"),lastAttended:"",status:"Active"}];}function createDefaultDatabase(){return{gyms:[{gymId:"GYM001",email:"admin@gmail.com",password:"1234"}],customers:createDefaultCustomers(),attendances:[]};}function readDatabase(){const raw=localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);if(!raw){const database=createDefaultDatabase();writeDatabase(database);return database;}try{return JSON.parse(raw);}catch(error){const database=createDefaultDatabase();writeDatabase(database);return database;}}function writeDatabase(database){localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY,JSON.stringify(database));}function buildResponse(data){return Promise.resolve({data});}function buildError(status,message){return Promise.reject({response:{status,data:{message}}});}function getGymIdFromToken(){const token=localStorage.getItem("token");if(!token||!token.startsWith("mock-token:")){return null;}return token.replace("mock-token:","");}function requireAuth(){const gymId=getGymIdFromToken();if(!gymId){throw{response:{status:401,data:{message:"No token"}}};}return gymId;}function getNotifications(customers){const today=new Date();today.setHours(0,0,0,0);return customers.map(customer=>{const planEnd=new Date(`${customer.planEnd}T00:00:00`);const diff=(planEnd.getTime()-today.getTime())/(1000*60*60*24);if(diff<0){return{name:customer.fullName,type:"expired"};}if(diff<=3){return{name:customer.fullName,type:"expiring"};}return null;}).filter(Boolean);}const mockApi={get(path){if(path==="/seed"){const database=createDefaultDatabase();writeDatabase(database);localStorage.removeItem("token");return buildResponse("Demo user created");}if(path==="/customers"){try{const gymId=requireAuth();const database=readDatabase();const customers=database.customers.filter(customer=>customer.gymId===gymId);return buildResponse(customers);}catch(error){return Promise.reject(error);}}if(path==="/notifications"){try{const gymId=requireAuth();const database=readDatabase();const customers=database.customers.filter(customer=>customer.gymId===gymId);return buildResponse(getNotifications(customers));}catch(error){return Promise.reject(error);}}return buildError(404,"Mock route not found.");},post(path,payload){if(path==="/login"){const database=readDatabase();const gym=database.gyms.find(item=>item.email===payload.email);if(!gym||gym.password!==payload.password){return buildError(401,"Invalid");}return buildResponse({token:`mock-token:${gym.gymId}`});}if(path==="/customers"){try{const gymId=requireAuth();const database=readDatabase();const gymCustomers=database.customers.filter(customer=>customer.gymId===gymId);const today=formatDate(new Date());const customer={gymId,customerId:gymCustomers.length+1,fullName:payload.fullName,phone:payload.phone,age:payload.age,plan:payload.plan,amountPaid:payload.amountPaid,planStart:today,planEnd:getPlanEndDate(today,payload.plan),lastAttended:"",status:"Active"};database.customers.push(customer);writeDatabase(database);return buildResponse(customer);}catch(error){return Promise.reject(error);}}if(path==="/customers/attendance"){try{const gymId=requireAuth();const database=readDatabase();const customer=database.customers.find(item=>item.gymId===gymId&&item.customerId===Number(payload.customerId));if(!customer){return buildError(404,"Not found");}const today=formatDate(new Date());customer.lastAttended=today;database.attendances.push({gymId,customerId:customer.customerId,date:today});writeDatabase(database);return buildResponse(customer);}catch(error){return Promise.reject(error);}}return buildError(404,"Mock route not found.");}};export default mockApi;
